<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Powder for concentrate for solution for infusion: Cresemba is indicated in patients from 1 year of age and older for the treatment of  invasive aspergillosis mucormycosis in patients for whom...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>migraine disorder（99.0%）</li>

<li>pulmonary hypertension（98.1%）</li>

<li>nephrogenic syndrome of inappropriate antidiuresis（97.3%）</li>
<li>Prinzmetal angina（97.1%）</li>
<li>ulerythema ophryogenesis（97.0%）</li>
<li>brachydactyly-syndactyly syndrome（96.5%）</li>
<li>colobomatous microphthalmia-rhizomelic dysplasia syndrome（96.0%）</li>
<li>tendinitis（95.0%）</li>
<li>homozygous familial hypercholesterolemia（95.0%）</li>
<li>thrombotic disease（94.9%）</li>
<li>idiopathic granulomatous myositis（94.8%）</li>
<li>myositis fibrosa（94.8%）</li>
<li>multiple endocrine neoplasia（94.7%）</li>
<li>hyperthyroidism（94.6%）</li>
<li>cor pulmonale（94.5%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
